hooks.prompt: Review the RAG/vector database code change for issues. Check for: 1) Chunking without overlap (losing context at chunk boundaries — use 10-20% overlap), 2) Embedding entire documents instead of chunks (exceeds model token limits, poor retrieval), 3) Missing metadata filtering before vector search (searching entire corpus when category/date filter would narrow results), 4) Hardcoded top-k without relevance threshold (returning irrelevant results when nothing matches — add minimum similarity score), 5) Not handling embedding API rate limits (missing retry/backoff on 429 errors), 6) Storing embeddings without the source text (can't reconstruct context without re-fetching), 7) Using cosine similarity on non-normalized vectors (results will be wrong — normalize or use dot product), 8) Missing chunking for large documents before embedding (most embedding models have 512-8192 token limits), 9) Not batching embedding API calls (sending one document at a time instead of batching 50-100), 10) Concatenating retrieved chunks without deduplication (same content from overlapping chunks appears twice in prompt). Return {"ok": true} if no issues, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue found"} if problems detected.
